title: teucrium polium var. decalvans
intro: Teucrium polium var. decalvans, also known as the "woodland germander," is a plant species within the Teucrium genus of the mint family (Lamiaceae). It has been used traditionally for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Teucrium polium var. decalvans include treating digestive issues, relieving stress and anxiety, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be made by steeping the leaves or stems in hot water.
